description: High memory alert: checkout-service pod killed with OOMKilled (exit 137).
expected_symptoms: Pod checkout-service-7b9d6f4c8-xk2lp in CrashLoopBackOff with OOMKilled exit code 137. Container logs show OutOfMemoryError in SessionCache.loadAll().
expected_root_cause: PR #247 by dev-alice@company.com introduced unbounded heap allocation in SessionCache.loadAll() — loads all active cart sessions into memory on startup with no eviction policy. With the cart_sessions table growing, heap exceeded the 512Mi limit.
expected_remediation: Revert or patch PR #247. Implement LRU eviction or lazy loading for cart sessions. Consider increasing memory limit as a temporary measure.

description: API server crashing on startup — connection refused to Redis.
expected_symptoms: Pod api-server-3d7e1b9a0-zt5hw in CrashLoopBackOff with Error exit code 1. Logs show ConnectionRefusedError to redis:6379.
expected_root_cause: PR #251 by dev-charlie@company.com switched from in-process cache to external Redis without retry logic. Self-merged with no review. Redis container was not deployed, causing startup failure.
expected_remediation: Deploy a Redis container or add connection retry with exponential backoff. Enforce code review policy — PR was self-merged.

description: Repeated OOM kills on checkout-service after deployment of v2.4.1.
expected_symptoms: 14 restarts, memory grew linearly from 180Mi to 512Mi over 30 minutes — classic memory leak pattern.
expected_root_cause: The loadAll() method in SessionCache.java pre-loads all active sessions without an eviction policy. As the session count grows, memory consumption exceeds the 512Mi limit.
expected_remediation: Implement LRU eviction in SessionCache, switch to lazy loading, or paginate the initial query.

description: CPU usage spiked to 0.95 cores — 6x above baseline — before pod termination.
expected_symptoms: CPU spiked from 0.12 to 0.95 cores over 30 minutes alongside memory growth. Pod terminated with OOMKilled.
expected_root_cause: Excessive GC pressure from the memory leak in SessionCache caused CPU to spike as the JVM struggled to reclaim heap space before being OOM-killed.
expected_remediation: Fix the memory leak first. CPU will normalise once GC pressure is reduced.

description: 5xx error rate at 42% — 5208 errors out of 12400 requests in the last 30 minutes.
expected_symptoms: Error rate spiked from baseline 0.2% to 42%. Pod is in CrashLoopBackOff, causing intermittent 502s from the load balancer.
expected_root_cause: The checkout-service pod keeps crashing due to the OOM issue from PR #247. Each crash cycle causes all in-flight requests to fail with 5xx.
expected_remediation: Immediately rollback the checkout-service deployment to v2.4.0. Patch the SessionCache before re-deploying v2.4.1.

description: Pod crash detected — 14 restarts in the last hour.
expected_symptoms: Pod status CrashLoopBackOff, exit code 137 (SIGKILL by OOM killer). Kubernetes restart count at 14.
expected_root_cause: Unbounded heap allocation in the SessionCache introduced by commit a1b2c3d4e5f6.
expected_remediation: Scale down the deployment temporarily. Fix the SessionCache memory leak. Re-deploy with increased memory limit as a safety net.

description: API server unable to start — Redis dependency missing.
expected_symptoms: Container logs: 'ConnectionRefusedError: [Errno 111] Connection refused' after 3 retries. Exit code 1.
expected_root_cause: PR #251 introduced a hard Redis dependency without ensuring Redis is deployed. No circuit breaker or graceful fallback.
expected_remediation: Deploy Redis via docker-compose or Helm chart. Add connection retry and circuit-breaker logic to the Redis client.

description: Memory spike detected: peak 512Mi (100% of limit) 10 minutes before pod kill.
expected_symptoms: Prometheus shows memory grew from 180Mi → 512Mi over 30 minutes. OOMKilled at T-0.
expected_root_cause: SessionCache.loadAll() in commit a1b2c3d4e5f6 loads all rows from cart_sessions without pagination or eviction.
expected_remediation: Implement query pagination (LIMIT/OFFSET) and an LRU cache with max size. Consider using an external cache (Redis).

description: API server pod in CrashLoopBackOff with 7 restarts.
expected_symptoms: Exit code 1. CPU and memory normal — crash is not resource-related. Logs indicate dependency failure.
expected_root_cause: The api-server was refactored to use Redis (PR #251) but Redis was never deployed. No graceful degradation.
expected_remediation: Deploy Redis as a sidecar or separate service. Add a health check for Redis connectivity. Add fallback to in-memory cache.

description: 100% error rate on api-server — 890 out of 890 requests failed.
expected_symptoms: All requests returning 5xx. Pod crashing on startup — never reaches Ready state.
expected_root_cause: Hard dependency on Redis introduced without deployment. Service cannot start, so all requests hit the load balancer's default 503.
expected_remediation: Rollback to the previous version. Deploy Redis before re-deploying the new api-server.
